text:
How r
many s
students have scored less than
120
marks? Observe
that the
enumber
of students who have scored 1ess than
n 20 include the number of students who have
scored marks from 0 - 10 as well as the number of students who have scored marks
from 10 - 20. So, the total number of students with marks less than 20 is 5 + 3, i.e., 8.
We say
that the cumulative f
frequency of the class
10 -20 is 8.
